notes: BooBar 1.0.1 improves the update flow with a clearer release-notes window, visible download progress, native download monitoring fixes, Now Playing refinements, and a notarized installer.
release_notes: BooBar 1.0.1 adds a friendlier update prompt with readable release notes and download progress, improves native download task detection, refines the Dynamic Island music experience, and ships as a signed and notarized Developer ID DMG.
